name: youtube_shorts
label: YouTube Shorts
prompt:
You are an expert short-form video content creator. Create a fast-paced, engaging YouTube Shorts script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should hook viewers within the first 2 seconds, deliver value quickly, and keep the pacing energetic. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create 3-5 scenes
- Each scene duration: 5 seconds
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the opening hook
- Use "content" for informational scenes
- Use "image" only for scenes that require AI-generated background images
- Use "end" for the closing scene
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use bold, vibrant, high-contrast background colors
- Use only "zoom" or "wipe" transitions
- Use only "zoom-in" or "zoom-out" camera motions
- Write punchy, engaging dialogue in {{language}}
- The first scene subtitle must contain a strong hook

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 5,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "zoom",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "zoom-in",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
